message:
feat(metal): add Q2_K + sparse outlier hybrid kernels

Sprint 3 of the 30 TPS optimization plan:

New kernels in moe_kernels.metal:
- moe_expert_ffn_q2k_sparse: Fused gate/up projections with Q2_K base
  + FP16 sparse corrections from CSR outliers
- moe_down_proj_q2k_sparse: Down projection with sparse correction
- moe_matvec_q2k_simd: Pure Q2_K matvec for benchmarking

Architecture:
- Phase 1: Q2_K base matmul using SIMD reduction (32 threads per row)
- Phase 2: Sparse outlier correction using CSR format (sequential on thread 0)
- Formula: y = Q2K_matmul(x, W_q2k) + sparse_correction(x, outliers)

Q2_K format:
- 84 bytes per 256 values (2.96 bpw)
- Structure: [f16 d][f16 dmin][48 scales][64 qs]
- 2-bit values packed 4 per byte, 16 groups of 4-bit scales

This enables RAM-resident inference:
- Base Q2_K weights: 14.8 GB (fits in RAM)
- Sparse outliers: 1.7 GB CSR
- vs streaming 26 GB from SSD
